FFmpeg Windows bundled binary

Source:
https://www.gyan.dev/ffmpeg/builds/ffmpeg-release-essentials.zip

Downloaded package:
ffmpeg-8.1.1-essentials_build

Downloaded on:
2026-05-22

SHA256:
6f58ce889f59c311410f7d2b18895b33c03456463486f3b1ebc93d97a0f54541

Notes:
This build is provided by gyan.dev and contains ffmpeg.exe, ffprobe.exe, and ffplay.exe.
Only ffmpeg.exe and ffprobe.exe are bundled here because this project does not use ffplay.
See README.txt and licenses/LICENSE for upstream build notes and license details.
